vibe: Monday morning vibes — city pop shimmer, deep house warmth, nu jazz grooves, Persian soul & post-punk edge

tracks.reason: City pop deep cut — adjacent to Taeko Onuki and 加藤有紀 in his rotation

tracks.name: Can You Feel It
tracks.reason: Deep house foundation — connects to his Kevin Yost, Jimpster, Osunlade taste

tracks.name: Brian
tracks.reason: Nu jazz with soul — bridges Yussef Dayes and Nujabes in his top artists

tracks.name: Jooni Joonom

tracks.reason: Persian pop classic — follows his Googoosh, Homayoun Shajarian, Nooshafarin thread

tracks.name: Early Summer (Remastered 2025)
tracks.reason: Japanese jazz piano — intersects his love of Japanese music and jazz fusion

tracks.name: Paris - Aeroplane Remix
tracks.reason: Disco-house energy — links to Folamour and The Magician in his recent plays

tracks.reason: Post-punk/darkwave — adjacent to Boy Harsher and New Order in his top artists

tracks.reason: Soul/funk collective — connects Sade's smoothness with The Blackbyrds groove he saved
